name: quoxmcp
description: QuoxMCP — bridges Claude Desktop to your QuoxCORE collector. Surfaces 130+ infrastructure tools, 5 resources, and 4 operational prompts via MCP.

collector_url.title: Collector URL
collector_url.description: Base URL of your QuoxCORE collector (e.g. http://192.168.88.126:9848)

service_key.title: Service Key
service_key.description: INTERNAL_SERVICE_KEY from your QuoxCORE deployment. Find it in the dashboard's .env or settings.

agent_id.title: Agent ID
agent_id.description: RBAC agent identity. 'quox' = full access; specialist agents (CIPHER, NOVA, ATLAS, etc.) get tool subsets.

org_id.title: Organisation ID
org_id.description: Your QuoxCORE org ID. Required for audit trail attribution. Find it in your dashboard profile.

user_id.title: User ID
user_id.description: Your QuoxCORE user ID. Required for audit trail attribution. Find it in your dashboard profile.
